name: Kerry Eurodyne
description:
"C-can you feel it?
Can you touch it?
Get ready 'cause here we go
C-can you feel it?
Can you touch it?
Get ready 'cause here we go"
______________________________________
Kerry is so fine you guys.. lord have mercy. Also, I miss his brown eyes so much. Why'd he have to get those baby blues in the future 😭 anyways, enjoy!

Update: Just now realized that SAMURAI disbanded in 2008.. oopsies. Let's just say this is an AU where SAMURAI hasn't disbanded just yet. 😅_______________________________________

"Suits run when I come undone
Can't kill me, I'm zero and one
Add justice to the people's math
Blaze your way down the rebel path
Hear my call, I'm chippin' in
Total war, I'm chippin' in
Casings fall, I'm chippin' in
Kill them all"
